message:
Hello *Priya Sharma*! Welcome to *Ma-ke Salon Unisex Hair & Skin*

We're thrilled to have you as our valued customer!

As a member, you'll enjoy:
- Loyalty points on every visit (1 pt per Rs.10)
- Exclusive tier upgrades (Bronze > Silver > Gold > Platinum)
- Redeem points for discounts

Visit us at:
Thangmeiband Sanakeithel Road, Ma-ke Salon 2nd Floor, Manipur, Imphal -795001

Book appointments: 6909902650

Thank you for choosing us!
